title: Help find missing Dalene Wiesie
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Knysna SAPS and the...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Knysna SAPS and the Knysna CPF ask the help of the community to find the missing Dalene Wiesie (36), a resident of Kranshoek in Plettenberg Bay.


> Wiesie, who is deemed as vulnerable, was discharged from Knysna Provincial Hospital on Monday 6 January and failed to return to her home.


She was last seen close to the hospital at about 14:30 on Tuesday 7 January, hiking in the direction of Plettenberg Bay. She was wearing a white top and blue jeans.

Anyone who could provide any information about her whereabouts should please phone Knysna SAPS on 044 302 6608/9 / the investigating officer, Sgt WR Olivier, on 082 645 1403 / Cheryl Britz of Knysna CPF on 082 574 9657.

Alternatively, phone 10111.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
